issues.detail: The skill relies on Unix-specific tools like grep, which may not be available on all platforms.

scenarios.name: review-feature-branch-risk
scenarios.rationale: Baseline runs git diff and comments on the patch but never maps changes to graph nodes or writes diff-overlay.json; treatment gets changed files first, performs 1-hop edge traversal for blast radius, and emits the overlay file.

scenarios.name: payment-file-impact
scenarios.rationale: Baseline notes the file is risky based on filename heuristics; treatment locates the file: node, lists concrete upstream callers via edges, scores risk using node complexity, and writes the diff-overlay JSON the skill mandates.
